programme.title: Domino
programme.desc: Copenhagen cop Christian Toft uncovers a terrorist cell after being inadvertently responsible for the death of his older partner, Lars. programme.title: White Boy Rick
programme.desc: A single father is struggling to raise two teenagers during the height of the crack epidemic in 1980s Detroit. Crime drama, starring Matthew McConaughey, Richie Merritt and Bel Powley. Yann Demange Matthew McConaughey Richie Merritt Bel Powley Jennifer Jason Leigh Brian Tyree Henry

programme.title: Unstoppable
programme.desc: A driverless train carrying a deadly cargo of toxic chemicals goes out of control. Action thriller, the final film from director Tony Scott, starring Denzel Washington, Chris Pine and Rosario Dawson. programme.title: Out of Blue
programme.desc: Mike Hoolihan is a New Orleans cop investigating the murder of astrophysicist Jennifer Rockwell, a black hole expert found shot dead in her observatory. Director Carol Morley's drama based on the Martin Amis novel, starring Patricia Clarkson, Toby Jones and James Caan. Carol Morley Patricia Clarkson Toby Jones James Caan Jacki Weaver Lucy Faust

Writer/director Frederic Petitjean's action thriller, starring Jean Reno, Sarah Lind and Joe Anderson. Frederic Petitjean Jean Reno Sarah Lind Joe Anderson David Gyasi Ihor Ciszkewycz

programme.title: Gemini
programme.desc: Jill LeBeau, the assistant of Hollywood starlet Heather Anderson, arrives at her boss's house one day to find her dead from a gunshot wound. programme.desc: A psychopathic rapist is released from prison after 14 years and plots revenge on the defence attorney he blames for his imprisonment. programme.title: The Padre
programme.desc: A con man nicknamed the Padre goes on the run from his dogged pursuers, US Court Justice Nemes and local police officer Gaspar. Director Jonathan Sobol's crime drama, starring Tim Roth, Nick Nolte and Luis Guzman. Jonathan Sobol Tim Roth Nick Nolte Luis Guzman Valeria Henriquez Juana Arboleda

programme.title: Point Last Seen
programme.desc: The head of a search and rescue team whose children were kidnapped by her ex-husband hunts obsessively for a girl gone missing in the desert. programme.title: Spider in the Web

programme.desc: A former Marine leaves military life behind and retrains as a teacher. Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his boss's empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. programme.title: Se7en
programme.desc: An old-school detective and his headstrong new partner discover a connection between two unusually horrific murders, and realise they are on the trail of a serial killer who deems his victims to be each guilty of one of the seven deadly sins. David Fincher's thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Morgan Freeman, Gwyneth Paltrow and Kevin Spacey. programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Academic adventurer Robert Langdon is called in by the Vatican to deal with a crisis. Sacha Gervasi Ansel Elgort Chloe Grace Moretz David Strathairn Catherine Keener Terry Kinney

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: Cousins Vincent and Anton are players in the high-stakes game of high-frequency trading. They want to build a straight fibre-optic cable line between Kansas and New Jersey, making them a fortune and taking them on a daring adventure. Writer/director Kim Nguyen's drama, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Alexander Skarsgard and Salma Hayek. Kim Nguyen Jesse Eisenberg Alexander Skarsgard Salma Hayek Michael Mando Ayisha Issa

programme.title: The First Purge
programme.desc: The US government trials a controversial experiment to legalise all crime for one night. Thriller prequel, starring Y'lan Noel, Lex Scott Davis, Joivan Wade and Marisa Tomei. Gerard McMurray Y'lan Noel Lex Scott Davis Joivan Wade Mugga Marisa Tomei Patch Darragh

programme.title: We Die Young
programme.desc: Lucas, a 14-year-old lad inducted into gang life in Washington DC, is determined that his 10-year-old brother won't follow the same path. When Daniel, an Afghanistan war veteran with PTSD arrives in the neighbourhood, it's not long before the gangsters' world and Daniel's collide. Drama, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme and Elijah Rodriguez. Lior Geller Jean-Claude Van Damme Elijah Rodriguez David Castaneda Kerry Bennett Joseph Long

programme.title: Miss Bala
programme.desc: Gloria Fuentes, a Latin-American makeup artist from Los Angeles, finds a power she never knew she had when she is drawn into the dangerous world of DEA officers, gangsters and cross-border crime. Twilight director Catherine Hardwicke's remake of the namesake Mexican crime drama, starring Gina Rodriguez, Ismael Cruz Córdova and Anthony Mackie. Catherine Hardwicke Gina Rodriguez Ismael Cruz Cordova Anthony Mackie Matt Lauria Ricardo Abarca

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Brad Pitt and Jason Statham star in this high energy crime caper as cockney 'geezers', Russian gangsters, Irish travellers and Jewish bookies fight it out to track down an elusive stolen diamond. Guy Ritchie Jason Statham Brad Pitt Benicio Del Toro Stephen Graham Mike Reid Jason Flemyng Dennis Farina Alan Ford Ewen Bremner Vinnie Jones

programme.title: A Good Woman Is Hard to Find
programme.desc: A recently widowed woman prepares to go to any lengths as she hunts for the truth about her husband's murder while trying to protect her two young children. Belgian crime thriller, starring Sarah Bolger, Edward Hogg and Andrew Simpson. Abner Pastoll Sarah Bolger Edward Hogg Andrew Simpson

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang. Clint Eastwood Clint Eastwood Christopher Carley Bee Vang Ahney Her Brian Haley Geraldine Hughes Dreama Walker Brian Howe

programme.title: Domino
programme.desc: Copenhagen cop Christian Toft uncovers a terrorist cell after being inadvertently responsible for the death of his older partner, Lars. Hansen's quest for justice leaves his life in danger as he gets closer to the killer. Brian De Palma's crime thriller, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Soren Malling and Paprika Steen. Brian De Palma Nikolaj Coster-Waldau Soren Malling Paprika Steen Eriq Ebouaney Guy Pearce Carice van Houten

programme.title: Point Last Seen
programme.desc: The head of a search and rescue team whose children were kidnapped by her ex-husband hunts obsessively for a girl gone missing in the desert. However, her search is interrupted by news that her spouse has been found - but the children he took are nowhere to be found. Fact-based drama, starring Linda Hamilton and Kevin Kilner. Elodie Keene Linda Hamilton Kevin Kilner Kieren Van Den Blink Sam Hennings Mary Kay Place Kory Thompson Holly Belnap Dana Reilly

programme.title: Blood Brother
programme.desc: When a former convict takes lethal revenge against the childhood friends who he believes let him pay the price for a crime they committed together, one of the pals, now a law enforcer, risks his life to stop him. Director John Pogue's crime thriller, starring Trey Songz and Jack Kesy. John Pogue Trey Songz Jack Kesy China Anne McClain Hassan Johnson Fetty Wap

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Led by their financial expert friend Joe Hunt, a group of young men in 1980s Los Angeles hatch a plan to get-rich-quick with a Ponzi scheme. However, the plan ends badly when Hunt and friend Jim Pittman decide to murder investor and con man Ron Levin. Co-writer/director James Cox's drama, starring Ansel Elgort, Taron Egerton and Emma Roberts. James Cox Ansel Elgort Taron Egerton Emma Roberts Kevin Spacey Ryan Rottman

programme.title: The Old Man & the Gun
programme.desc: Forrest Tucker, a criminal since the age of 15, has escaped from most of the prisons that tried to hold him. At the end of his career, he has become a gentleman bank robber. However, cop John Hunt becomes determined to catch him. Writer/director David Lowery's light hearted drama based on a true story, starring Robert Redford, Casey Affleck and Sissy Spacek. David Lowery Robert Redford Casey Affleck Sissy Spacek Danny Glover Tika Sumpter Tom Waits

programme.title: Rust Creek
programme.desc: Sawyer, an ambitious, overachieving college student, has a seemingly bright future. While on her way to a job interview, a wrong turn leaves her stranded in a frozen Kentucky forest. Suddenly, the young woman who has everything to live for finds herself facing death as she's punished by the elements and pursued by a band of ruthless outlaws. Thriller, starring Hermione Corfield, Jay Paulson and Sean O'Bryan. Jen McGowan Hermione Corfield Jay Paulson Sean O'Bryan Micah Hauptman Daniel R Hill Jeremy Glazer

programme.title: Cold Blood Legacy
programme.desc: Henry, a hit-man living in an isolated in a cabin at the edge of a lake, spends his time reading and staying out of trouble, One day, Charly, a woman injured in a snowmobile accident, arrives, so he attempts to nurse her back to health, but it's not long before both are in danger. Writer/director Frederic Petitjean's action thriller, starring Jean Reno, Sarah Lind and Joe Anderson. Frederic Petitjean Jean Reno Sarah Lind Joe Anderson David Gyasi Ihor Ciszkewycz

programme.title: The Wedding Guest
programme.desc: Jay, a British Muslim, travels from the United Kingdom to Pakistan to attend a wedding. Armed with duct tape and a shotgun, he plots to kidnap the bride-to-be, Samira. However, the plan falls apart when a guard witnesses the kidnapping, tries to intervene and Jay kills him. Michael Winterbottom's thriller, starring Dev Patel, Radhika Apte and Jim Sarbh. Michael Winterbottom Dev Patel Radhika Apte Jim Sarbh Harish Khanna Nish Nathwani Meherbaan Singh

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai
programme.desc: In 2008, at the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel, four terrorists take the staff and residents hostage. However, some of the employees risk their lives to protect their guests. Writer/director Anthony Maras's fact-based thriller, starring Dev Patel, Armie Hammer and Jason Isaacs. Anthony Maras Dev Patel Armie Hammer Jason Isaacs Nazanin Boniadi Anupam Kher

programme.title: The Old Man & the Gun
programme.desc: Forrest Tucker, a criminal since the age of 15, has escaped from most of the prisons that tried to hold him. At the end of his career, he has become a gentleman bank robber. However, cop John Hunt becomes determined to catch him. Writer/director David Lowery's light hearted drama based on a true story, starring Robert Redford, Casey Affleck and Sissy Spacek. David Lowery Robert Redford Casey Affleck Sissy Spacek Danny Glover Tika Sumpter Tom Waits

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A disillusioned man learns his father was a member of a secret society of superpowered assassins dedicated to eliminating people who are destined to commit acts of evil in the future. Having inherited his father's special abilities, he is recruited into the organisation and must take on a former member who has betrayed it. Action adventure, starring James McAvoy, Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman. Timur Bekmambetov James McAvoy Angelina Jolie Morgan Freeman Terence Stamp Thomas Kretschmann Common Marc Warren Konstantin Khabensky

programme.title: Rise of the Footsoldier 4: Marbella
programme.desc: Fresh out of prison, a former nightclub owner heads to Marbella to seek revenge against the man who put him away - but things quickly unravel. Action comedy, starring Craig Fairbrass, Emily Wyatt and Terry Stone. Andrew Loveday Craig Fairbrass Emily Wyatt Terry Stone

programme.title: CRSHD
programme.desc: College student Izzy attends an exclusive 'Crush Party' with the help of her two best friends in a last-ditch attempt to lose her virginity before the freshman year ends, but things don't go to plan. Her moral compass skews as the night progresses and it seems her quest to have sex might cost Izzy her friends. Comedy, starring Isabelle Barbier, Deeksha Ketkar and Sadie Scott. Emily Cohn Isabelle Barbier Deeksha Ketkar Sadie Scott

programme.title: The Head Hunter
programme.desc: A medieval warrior who keeps a gory assortment of severed heads sets out to complete his collection by hunting down the monster that killed his daughter. Fantasy horror, starring Christopher Rygh and Cora Kaufman. Jordan Downey Christopher Rygh Cora Kaufman Aisha Ricketts

programme.title: Leo Da Vinci: Mission Mona Lisa
programme.desc: Premiere. A young Leonardo Da Vinci is struggling with his incredible inventions, and embarks on an epic adventure with his friends after meeting a mysterious storyteller who tells him about hidden treasures. Animated adventure, with the voices of Johnny Yong Bosch,Cherami Leigh and Bryce Papenbrook. Sergio Manfio Johnny Yong Bosch Cherami Leigh Bryce Papenbrook

programme.title: Corpus Christi
programme.desc: When a 20-year-old criminal experiences a spiritual transformation after his release from prison, he decides to minister a small-town parish, which also offers an opportunity for the local community to begin the healing process after a tragedy that happened there. Drama, starring Bartosz Bielenia, Aleksandra Konieczna and Eliza Rycembel. In Polish. Jan Komasa Bartosz Bielenia Aleksandra Konieczna Eliza Rycembel

programme.title: Adam
programme.desc: An awkward and self-conscious teenager named Adam is thrust into New York's lesbian and trans activist scene when he travels there to visit his sister. When Adam falls at first sight for Gillian, a smart young woman in this new crowd, she mistakenly assumes he is trans. Flummoxed and enamoured, he haplessly goes along with her assumption, resulting in an increasingly complex comedy of errors. Comedy, starring Nicholas Alexander, Bobbi Menuez and Margaret Qualley. Rhys Ernst Nicholas Alexander Bobbi Menuez Margaret Qualley

programme.title: The Bouncer
programme.desc: An imprisoned bodyguard in his 50s is forced to work with the police and infiltrate the organisation of a dangerous Flemish gang leader to secure his freedom and the custody of his eight-year-old daughter. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Sami Bouajila and Sveva Alviti. In French. Julien Leclercq Jean-Claude Van Damme Sami Bouajila Sveva Alviti

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: In the 26th century, dismantled cyborg Alita is repaired by Dr Dyson Ido, a kindly technician with a dark secret. As she falls in love with local youth Hugo, the truth behind her mysterious past is eventually revealed. Director Robert Rodriguez's fantasy adventure based on the manga comic, starring Rosa Salazar, Christoph Waltz and Jennifer Connelly. Robert Rodriguez Rosa Salazar Christoph Waltz Jennifer Connelly Mahershala Ali Ed Skrein Keean Johnson

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: When a money launderer in New York City wakes up with millions in stolen cash and drugs, and no memory of how he got it, he sets out to find answers - but a crew of dirty cops are after him. Action drama, starring Liam Hemsworth, Emory Cohen and Diane Guerrero. Malik Bader Liam Hemsworth Emory Cohen Diane Guerrero

programme.title: Curious George: Royal Monkey
programme.desc: Animated adventure in which George trades places with the king's monkey, Philippe. With the voices of Frank Welker, Jeff Bennett and Daniela Bobadilla. Doug Murphy Frank Welker Jeff Bennett Daniela Bobadilla

He is forced to use his combat training once more to defend his neighbourhood from a crooked landlord and his thugs. Comedy, starring Adam Sandler, John Turturro and Emmanuelle Chriqui. programme.desc: A small-town beat combo become a national overnight sensation with their debut record - but their sudden success looks to be a one-off, leaving them struggling to find a way of repeating the formula. A scientist learns the world is soon to face a global cataclysm that will wipe out the human race, but finds the US president has plans to secretly save a fraction of the population, leaving everyone else to die. programme.desc: Three private investigators are recruited to rescue a computer genius from the clutches of a rival. They discover there is more at stake than they thought, as the captive genius has created a dangerous piece of software that must not fall into the wrong hands. Action adventure, based on the TV series, starring Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore, Lucy Liu and Bill Murray. McG Drew Barrymore Cameron Diaz Lucy Liu Bill Murray John Forsythe Tim Curry Sam Rockwell Kelly Lynch LL Cool J

programme.title: Armageddon
programme.desc: Nasa discovers an asteroid the size of Texas is on a collision course with Earth, so a drilling expert is recruited to train a team of misfits to transport a nuclear device into outer space to destroy it - but having had no experience of space travel, the reluctant astronauts find themselves seriously out of their depth. Sci-fi thriller, with Bruce Willis, Ben Affleck, Liv Tyler, Michael Clarke Duncan, Billy Bob Thornton and Steve Buscemi. Michael Bay Bruce Willis Ben Affleck Liv Tyler Billy Bob Thornton Michael Clarke Duncan Steve Buscemi Keith David Jason Isaacs Chris Ellis Peter Stormare

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of Jurassic World, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing are asked to return to the theme park to save its resident dinosaurs from the island's active volcano. During their mission, they uncover a conspiracy that may affect the entire planet. Action sequel, starring Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, Rafe Spall and Toby Jones. JA Bayona Chris Pratt Bryce Dallas Howard Rafe Spall Toby Jones Isabella Sermon Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: An intrepid treasure-hunter follows a series of ingenious clues in a perilous quest to track down a war chest hidden by America's founding fathers generations before. He has to contend with determined rivals in the shape of a treacherous associate and the FBI. Action adventure, starring Nicolas Cage, Diane Kruger, Sean Bean and Justin Bartha. Jon Turteltaub Nicolas Cage Diane Kruger Sean Bean Justin Bartha Jon Voight Harvey Keitel Christopher Plummer David Dayan Fisher

programme.title: National Treasure: Book of Secrets

programme.desc: When a mysterious pandemic wipes out most of America's children, those who survive are gifted with superpowers. Dystopian thriller, starring Amandla Stenberg and Mandy Moore. Jennifer Yuh Nelson Amandla Stenberg Mandy Moore Bradley Whitford Harris Dickinson Patrick Gibson

programme.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
programme.desc: Chris Evans stars as the Marvel superhero dedicated to defending USA during WWII. Joe Johnston Chris Evans Hugo Weaving Hayley Atwell Tommy Lee Jones Sebastian Stan Dominic Cooper Stanley Tucci Toby Jones

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox. Rob Minkoff Geena Davis Hugh Laurie Michael J Fox Jonathan Lipnicki Jennifer Tilly Nathan Lane Chazz Palminteri Jeffrey Jones Steve Zahn Harold Gould

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: In a follow up to cartoon feature Cleo, Frankie Four-Eyes and his team return for a spectacular sled race through the city, but it won't be an easy win as their big-headed opponent has a few tricks up his sleeve. Animated adventure, with the voices of Lucinda Davis and Tod Fennell. Benoit Godbout, Francois Brisson Lucinda Davis Tod Fennell Noel Fisher Dawn Ford Angela Galuppo

programme.title: Up and Away
programme.desc: Young Hodja gets to go on the adventure he's been longing for when he is given a flying carpet by a man who wants him to find his lost grandchild. Jim Henson Jennifer Connelly David Bowie Shelley Thompson Christopher Malcolm Shari Weiser Brian Henson Ron Mueck Dave Goelz

programme.title: Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: A downtrodden handyman is forced to look after his niece and nephew. Adam Shankman Adam Sandler Keri Russell Guy Pearce Russell Brand Richard Griffiths Teresa Palmer Lucy Lawless Courteney Cox

programme.title: Evolution
programme.desc: Two science teachers investigate a mysterious meteor and discover it is oozing a strange fluid containing millions of minuscule but rapidly evolving organisms - which start to turn into terrifying alien monsters with a taste for human flesh. Ivan Reitman David Duchovny Julianne Moore Orlando Jones Seann William Scott Dan Aykroyd Ted Levine Katharine Towne Ethan Suplee

programme.title: Mary Poppins Returns
programme.desc: In 1930s London, Michael Banks lives in his childhood home with his children, Annabel, John, and Georgie. Still grieving the death of his wife, and behind on loan payments, his house is due to be repossessed unless he comes up with the money soon. Thankfully help comes in the form of a practically perfect nanny who returns 25 years after her previous visit. Musical fantasy, starring Emily Blunt, Dick Van Dyke and Meryl Streep. Rob Marshall Emily Blunt Lin-Manuel Miranda Ben Whishaw Emily Mortimer Dick Van Dyke Meryl Streep

programme.title: Up
programme.desc: An elderly man looks to fulfill his childhood dreams in this modern day Disney classic. Peter Docter, Bob Peterson Ed Asner Jordan Nagai Christopher Plummer Bob Peterson Delroy Lindo Jerome Ranft John Ratzenberger Elie Docter

programme.title: Dr Seuss' The Lorax
programme.desc: A boy leaves his urban home in search of a real tree, and meets the reclusive industrialist who first created the city. The hermit tells the story of a grumpy forest creature who tried to stop him destroying the trees, and inspires the youngster to undo the damage that has been done. Animated fantasy based on the children's book, with the voices of Danny DeVito, Zac Efron and Ed Helms. Chris Renaud, Kyle Balda Danny DeVito Zac Efron Ed Helms Taylor Swift Betty White Rob Riggle Elmarie Wendel Jenny Slate

programme.title: Homeward Bound: the Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Two dogs and a cat are left in the temporary care of a friend when their owners are forced to move away. Thinking they have been abandoned, the trio hit the road in a bid to find their way home. Adventure, featuring the voices of Michael J Fox, Sally Field and Don Ameche. Kim Greist, Robert Hays and Benj Thall take the human roles. Duwayne Dunham Kim Greist Robert Hays Jean Smart Benj Thall Don Ameche Michael J Fox Sally Field

programme.title: Homeward Bound II: Lost in San Francisco
programme.desc: Two dogs and a cat are left to fend for themselves on the streets of San Francisco when their owners fly off on holiday and accidentally leave them behind. As they join a tough group of strays, they must avoid falling into the clutches of the sinister dog catchers. Adventure sequel, with the voices of Michael J Fox, Sally Field and Ralph Waite. programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: Pregnant Mollie is dumped by her boyfriend, and sets out after the baby's birth to find a surrogate father for her infant son Mikey, who comments on proceedings through a wisecracking inner monologue. Mikey is confident the cab driver who helped deliver him is the perfect man for the job - but his mother is less than convinced. Comedy, with John Travolta, Kirstie Alley and the voice of Bruce Willis. Amy Heckerling Kirstie Alley John Travolta Olympia Dukakis George Segal Bruce Willis Abe Vigoda Twink Caplan Don S Davis

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: The son of an overthrown king must embark on an epic sea voyage in search of the fabled Golden Fleece so he can return and reclaim his kingdom. Before he can seize the treasure, he has to overcome a series of horrific creatures, including a seven-headed monster and a horde of sword-wielding skeletons. Mythological fantasy adventure, starring Todd Armstrong, Honor Blackman, Nancy Kovack, Niall MacGinnis and Patrick Troughton, with special effects by Ray Harryhausen. Don Chaffey Todd Armstrong Nancy Kovack Honor Blackman Niall MacGinnis Laurence Naismith Patrick Troughton Gary Raymond Michael Gwynn Douglas Wilmer Jack Gwillim

programme.title: King Arthur
programme.desc: A Roman commander is posted to Britain in the last days of the empire and given a final mission to rescue a high-ranking official and his son stranded in the north. However, the endeavour reveals his true destiny is to lead the Britons against the new Saxon invasion, and marks the start of a legend. Historical adventure, starring Clive Owen, Keira Knightley, Ray Winstone, Ioan Gruffudd and Stephen Dillane. programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: A bumbling secret agent becomes Britain's leading spy following the assassination of all the country's other espionage experts. programme.title: Two for Joy
programme.desc: Aisha is a depressed widow looking after two kids, Vi and Troy. When Vi begs her mum to take them for a weekend break to their late dad's caravan on the coast, there they meet site manager Lias, his troubled sister Lillah, and daughter Miranda, who begins a friendship with Troy. Drama, starring Samantha Morton and Daniel Mays. Tom Beard Samantha Morton Daniel Mays Billie Piper Bella Ramsey Emilia Jones Badger Skelton

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: While growing up in Texas, footballer Bart Millard suffers physical and emotional abuse at the hands of his alcoholic father. Bart later suffers a life-changing injury that changes the course of his life. Splitting from his girlfriend and escaping from his dad, he attempts to make his fortune in the city. Drama, inspired by MercyMe's, chart-topping song, starring J Michael Finley and Madeline Carroll. The Erwin Brothers J Michael Finley Madeline Carroll Dennis Quaid Cloris Leachman Tanya Clarke

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: The true story of Bert Trautmann, the German prisoner-of-war who became a footballing legend, and how he and his young English wife overcame prejudice, public hostility and personal tragedy in post-Second World War Britain. Director Marcus H Rosenmüller's biopic, starring David Kross, Freya Mavor and John Henshaw, who won a Best Supporting Actor award at the Beijing International Film Festival. Marcus H Rosenmüller David Kross Freya Mavor John Henshaw Harry Melling Michael Socha

programme.title: JT LeRoy
programme.desc: A young woman named Savannah Knoop spends six years pretending to be the celebrated author JT LeRoy. She's the made-up literary persona of her sister-in-law, who penned novels such as Sarah, and The Heart Is Deceitful Above All Things. Writer-director Justin Kelly's drama, starring Kristen Stewart, Laura Dern and Jim Sturgess. Justin Kelly Kristen Stewart Laura Dern Jim Sturgess Diane Kruger Kelvin Harrison Jr

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five teenagers who occupy different areas of their school's social structure are thrown together for a Saturday morning detention. During the day, they analyse their behaviour and find unexpected common ground. Drama, directed by John Hughes and starring Emilio Estevez, Judd Nelson, Molly Ringwald, Anthony Michael Hall, Ally Sheedy and Paul Gleason. John Hughes Emilio Estevez Judd Nelson Molly Ringwald Anthony Michael Hall Ally Sheedy Paul Gleason John Kapelos Perry Crawford

programme.title: Burning
programme.desc: Writer Jongsu crosses paths with Shin Hae-mi, a young woman who used to live in the same neighbourhood. After returning from a trip to Africa, she introduces Ben, a guy she met there, who raises Jongsu's suspicions. Director Lee Chang-dong's drama inspired by Haruki Murakami's short story Barn Burning, starring Ah-in Yoo, Steven Yeun and Jong-seo Jun. In Korean. Chang-dong Lee Ah-in Yoo Steven Yeun Jong-seo Jun Soo-Kyung Kim Seung-ho Choi

programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Nina Geld spends most of her nights working in small clubs, feeling sick before them, indulging in drunken one-night stands, as well as continuing an affair with an abusive married man. Eva Vives Mary Elizabeth Winstead Common Chace Crawford Jay Mohr Kate del Castillo

programme.title: Kramer vs Kramer
programme.desc: Ted Kramer takes stock of his life and decides to devote all his time and energy to raising his seven-year-old boy after his wife walks out on them. Things go well for the pair - until she makes an unexpected reappearance and demands sole custody of the child, a move that threatens to tear father and son apart. Oscar-winning drama, starring Dustin Hoffman, Meryl Streep, Justin Henry, Jane Alexander, JoBeth Williams and Howard Duff. Robert Benton Dustin Hoffman Meryl Streep Jane Alexander Justin Henry Howard Duff JoBeth Williams George Coe Bill Moor

programme.title: What They Had
programme.desc: After her Alzheimer's-stricken mother, Ruth, wanders into a blizzard on Christmas Eve, Bridget Ertz travels back to her hometown. There she tries to help her brother, Nicky, convince their father, to put Ruth in a nursing home and face the end of their marriage. Writer/director Elizabeth Chomko's drama, starring Hilary Swank, Michael Shannon, Robert Forster (in one of his final film appearances) and Blythe Danner. programme.desc: A troubled teenager moves to a tough inner-city school after her mother's death, but struggles to settle into her vastly different life - until a new boyfriend helps her discover a fresh sense of purpose through the power of dance. programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, conceptual artist Tina introduces her eight-month pregnant art school rival Karen to her non-traditional surrogate Kiki. programme.title: Memories of Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle was raised by the queen of Christmas. When she inherits her late mother's house, Noelle discovers her mum was hiring a man called Dave to decorate it, and he convinces her to let him carry on the tradition. As the display goes up, Noelle embraces the town's festive gala that was her mother's legacy, and finds love along the way. Romantic drama, starring Christina Milian and Mark Taylor. programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: A chauffeur's daughter falls for her father's playboy employer, but when he rejects her she flees to Paris. On her return, however, he is smitten by the alluring woman she has become - even though he is about to be married. To ensure the wedding takes place, his older brother decides to woo the beauty himself. Comedy, starring Audrey Hepburn, William Holden, Humphrey Bogart and Walter Hampden. programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Freddie Mercury and Queen go from playing small venues to becoming one of the biggest rock bands in the world. While Freddie comes to terms with his sexuality, outside forces threaten to tear the group apart, until their defining moment at Live Aid in July 1985. Oscar-winning biopic, starring Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton and Gwilym Lee. Bryan Singer, Dexter Fletcher Rami Malek Lucy Boynton Gwilym Lee Ben Hardy Joseph Mazzello Aidan Gillen Mike Myers

programme.title: The Nutcracker and the Four Realms
programme.desc: In Victorian London, young Clara receives an egg-shaped box from her late mother, which she is unable to unlock, together with a note saying that inside the gift is all she will ever need. Clara just needs a magical key to unlock the device. A golden thread leads her to the coveted key, but it is soon transported to a mysterious parallel world. Lasse Hallstrom and Joe Johnston's fantasy adventure, starring Mackenzie Foy, Keira Knightley and Morgan Freeman. Lasse Hallström, Joe Johnston Mackenzie Foy Keira Knightley Morgan Freeman Helen Mirren Jack Whitehall Richard E Grant

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Harvard law graduate Mitch is headhunted to work for a prestigious law firm, despite his wife's warnings that it is too good to be true. After two of his colleagues are murdered, Mitch is approached by the FBI and informed the company is controlled by the Mafia - leaving him in a deadly predicament. Thriller, adapted from the novel by John Grisham, starring Tom Cruise, Gene Hackman, Jeanne Tripplehorn and Holly Hunter. programme.title: Us

Jordan Peele's horror thriller, starring Lupita Nyong'o, Winston Duke and Elisabeth Moss. Jordan Peele Lupita Nyong'o Winston Duke Elisabeth Moss Tim Heidecker Shahadi Wright Joseph Evan Alex

programme.desc: Jedi Knights Obi-Wan Kenobi and Qui-Gon Jinn are instructed to protect Queen Amidala when her planet is invaded. programme.title: The Night Sitter
programme.desc: A con artist targets a wealthy paranormal investigator by posing as a babysitter. However, she gets more than she bargained for thanks to visitors from the other side, a trio of witches known as the Three Mothers. Comedy horror, starring Elyse Dufour, Jack Champion and Jermaine Rivers. Abiel Bruhn, John Rocco Elyse Dufour Jack Champion Jermaine Rivers Amber Neukum J Benedict Larmore

programme.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
programme.desc: A British boarding school becomes a blood-soaked battleground when a strange sinkhole appears at a nearby fracking site, unleashing all manner of horrors for a reluctant new pupil and his associates. Comedy horror co-written and directed by Crispian Mills, former frontman with Kula Shaker, starring Asa Butterfield, Simon Pegg and Margot Robbie. Crispian Mills Asa Butterfield Simon Pegg Nick Frost Margot Robbie Michael Sheen

programme.title: Iron Man
programme.desc: Arms manufacturer Tony Stark is taken hostage by a terrorist group and realises the weapons his company build have been falling into the wrong hands. Using his engineering skills to construct a hi-tech armoured suit, he manages to escape and then puts the technology to good use in the fight against evil around the world. Superhero adventure, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jeff Bridges, Gwyneth Paltrow and Terrence Howard. Jon Favreau Robert Downey Jr Jeff Bridges Gwyneth Paltrow Terrence Howard Shaun Toub Jon Favreau Faran Tahir Clark Gregg

programme.title: Iron Man 2
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr is back in the heavy suit and now he's set to battle Mickey Rourke. Jon Favreau Robert Downey Jr Mickey Rourke Don Cheadle Gwyneth Paltrow Scarlett Johansson Sam Rockwell Samuel L Jackson Jon Favreau

programme.title: Overlord
programme.desc: In 1944, a group of American soldiers land in an occupied French hamlet after their plane is destroyed by enemy fire. Their mission is to take out a heavily fortified Nazi radio tower hours before D-Day. However, they stumble across a mysterious Nazi lab where their bloodthirsty enemies are waiting for them. Action thriller from producer JJ Abrams, starring Jovan Adepo, Wyatt Russell and Mathilde Ollivier. Julius Avery Jovan Adepo Wyatt Russell Mathilde Ollivier Pilou Asbaek Iain de Caestecker

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: News of a friend's murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian O'Conner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster. Justin Lin Vin Diesel Paul Walker Michelle Rodriguez Jordana Brewster John Ortiz Laz Alonso Gal Gadot Jack Conley

programme.title: Fast Five
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBI's top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster. Justin Lin Vin Diesel Dwayne Johnson Paul Walker Jordana Brewster Tyrese Gibson Chris `Ludacris' Bridges Elsa Pataky Gal Gadot

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez. Justin Lin Vin Diesel Dwayne Johnson Michelle Rodriguez Paul Walker Jordana Brewster Gina Carano Luke Evans Chris `Ludacris' Bridges

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Vin Diesel star in the action-packed film about an LA street racing gang. Rob Cohen Vin Diesel Paul Walker Michelle Rodriguez Jordana Brewster Rick Yune Chad Lindberg Johnny Strong Ted Levine

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser. John Singleton Paul Walker Tyrese Gibson Eva Mendes Cole Hauser Ludacris James Remar Thom Barry Devon Aoki

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow. Justin Lin Lucas Black Bow Wow Nathalie Kelley Brian Tee Kang Sung Leonardo Nam Brian Goodman Sonny Chiba

programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky

programme.title: Lego DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs Bizarro League
programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseid's attempt to conquer the galaxy. Brandon Vietti Nolan North Diedrich Bader Troy Baker John DiMaggio Tom Kenny Phil Morris Khary Payton Kevin Michael Richardson Tony Todd

programme.title: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: A scientist and four members of his crew develop superhuman powers after exposure to cosmic radiation on a mission to study an energy storm in space. programme.desc: Convicted bank-robber Carl Quigley plots to exchange $1,000,000 in stolen bills by coercing a bank's president into swapping the notes for legal tender. As he tries to escape the scene of his plot, Quigley runs over 11-year-old Preston Waters' bicycle, and in his haste to get away, offers the boy a blank cheque as compensation. However, Quigley fails to anticipate tech-savvy Preston exploiting the gesture to help himself to the criminal's million-dollar fortune, then embarking a dream spending spree. programme.desc: An awkward and self-conscious teenager named Adam is thrust into New York's lesbian and trans activist scene when he travels there to visit his sister. When Adam falls at first sight for Gillian, a smart young woman in this new crowd, she mistakenly assumes he is trans. Flummoxed and enamoured, he haplessly goes along with her assumption, resulting in an increasingly complex comedy of errors. Comedy, starring Nicholas Alexander, Bobbi Menuez and Margaret Qualley. Rhys Ernst Nicholas Alexander Bobbi Menuez Margaret Qualley

programme.title: CRSHD
programme.desc: College student Izzy attends an exclusive 'Crush Party' with the help of her two best friends in a last-ditch attempt to lose her virginity before the freshman year ends, but things don't go to plan. Her moral compass skews as the night progresses and it seems her quest to have sex might cost Izzy her friends. Comedy, starring Isabelle Barbier, Deeksha Ketkar and Sadie Scott. Emily Cohn Isabelle Barbier Deeksha Ketkar Sadie Scott

programme.title: Men In Black II
programme.desc: With the scum of the universe menacing Earth again, agent Will Smith brings back Tommy Lee Jones to kick alien backside. Comic sequel. Mild fantasy violence/flashing images. (2002)(85 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Men In Black 3
programme.desc: Will Smith goes back to the 60s to save his partner from a murderous alien. Sci-fi comedy with Josh Brolin. Mild fantasy violence. (2012)(102 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Men In Black: International
programme.desc: The Men in Black are back to take down a new global threat - a mole within their own organisation. Starring Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson. (2019)(115 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: The Birds
programme.desc: Unflappable socialite Tippi Hedren follows a handsome lawyer back to his coastal home, but becomes terrorized by flocks of angry birds. Legendary Hitchcock horror. Violence. (1963)(114mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Psycho (1960)
programme.desc: Thief Janet Leigh makes a terrible mistake when she checks into a secluded motel run by Anthony Perkins. Alfred Hitchcock directs this groundbreaking thriller. Violence. (1960)(103 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Halloween (2018)
programme.desc: It's been 40 years since his Halloween killing spree, and Michael Myers has been in a mental asylum...until now. But Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis) is ready for him. (2018)(109 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Friday The 13th Part VII...
programme.desc: ...The New Blood: Freed from his watery grave, Jason begins another chopping spree. Slasher sequel. Contains strong language, violence, sex and flashing images. (1988)(85 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Project: Alf
programme.desc: Loveable alien Alf is captured by the military and faces an uncertain future. Comedy starring Miguel Ferrer and Martin Sheen. (1996)(87 mins)

programme.title: Fright Fest
programme.desc: A horror film festival held at an abandoned mental institution becomes a real-life nightmare when murderous prison inmates turn up to join the fun. (2018)(87 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Havana Darkness
programme.desc: When three friends get trapped in an old building, they make their way through a maze of deadly traps in a bid to escape. There's also a crazed killer hot on their tails... (2019)(84 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A divorced couple are reunited ten years after a tragedy ripped their happy marriage apart, when a supernatural event offers them the chance to heal their wounds. (2017)(91 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Fearless slayer Hugh Jackman and feisty vamp Kate Beckinsale do battle with Dracula, Frankenstein and the Wolfman. Action. Violence/flashing images. (2004)(127 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: The Omen (1976)
programme.desc: Gregory Peck switches kids after his wife delivers a stillborn baby, little realising that he's adopting the Antichrist. Violence/mature themes/flashing images. (1976)(107 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Damien: Omen II (1978)
programme.desc: Demon seed Damien Thorn reaches puberty and begins his inexorable rise to power. Apocalyptic horror sequel with William Holden and Lance Henriksen. Contains violence. (1978)(102 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Unfriended: Dark Web
programme.desc: Spine-chilling horror starring Colin Woodell as a teenager who makes a series of disturbing discoveries when he boots up a second-hand laptop. (2018)(92 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Upgrade
programme.desc: A mugging victim left widowed and quadriplegic is offered an AI implant cure. With his new mobility comes superhuman strength and a thirst for revenge. (2018)(100 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Fearless slayer Hugh Jackman and feisty vamp Kate Beckinsale do battle with Dracula, Frankenstein and the Wolfman. Action. Violence/flashing images. (2004)(127 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Oscar-winning take on the vampire legend, with Gary Oldman as the famous bloodsucker driven to London by passion. Strong language/violence/sex. (1992)(122 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: The Farm (2018)
programme.desc: A simple decision to stop at a diner has horrific consequences for a couple, who end up being kidnapped by farmers that serve humans as their main course. Disturbing themes. (2018)(80 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Friday The 13th Part VIII
programme.desc: Unstoppable killer Jason Voorhees boards an ocean liner and continues his killing spree en route to the Big Apple. With strong language, violence, sex and flashing images. (1989)(96 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky. Also in HD

programme.title: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: A group of college kids throw a Hawaiian-themed luau party in a bid to banish the winter blues, but it isn't long before an evil entity makes itself at home... Horror. (2018)(95 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: InControl (2017)
programme.desc: A struggling student finds herself in a dangerous situation when she stumbles upon a device which enables users to plug in to random minds of those around them. (2017)(82 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
programme.desc: Chaos descends on an esteemed British boarding school when a mysterious sinkhole appears and unleashes pure terror. Comedy horror with Simon Pegg and Asa Butterfield. (2018)(99 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Iron Man
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr has a blast as the cocky weapons designer turned peacemaker in this slick action adventure. With Jeff Bridges and Gwyneth Paltrow. Flashing images. (2008)(121 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Iron Man 2
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr steels the show as his metal-clad hero takes on Mickey Rourke's vengeful villain. Superb sequel with Don Cheadle, Scarlett Johansson and Sam Rockwell. (2010)(120 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: The Night Sitter
programme.desc: A con artist targets a wealthy paranormal investigator by posing as a babysitter, but gets more than she bargained for when she gets some visitors from the other side. (2018)(88 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
programme.desc: Chaos descends on an esteemed British boarding school when a mysterious sinkhole appears and unleashes pure terror. Comedy horror with Simon Pegg and Asa Butterfield. (2018)(99 mins) Also in HD

programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr has a blast as the cocky weapons designer turned peacemaker in this slick action adventure. With Jeff Bridges and Gwyneth Paltrow. Flashing images. (2008)(121 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: Iron Man 2
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr steels the show as his metal-clad hero takes on Mickey Rourke's vengeful villain. Superb sequel with Don Cheadle, Scarlett Johansson and Sam Rockwell. (2010)(120 mins) Also in HD

programme.title: MUTV Shorts: The Juan Show
programme.desc: Juan Mata invited us to his father's Manchester restaurant to celebrate 200 games for United and look back on his favourite moments as a Red so far

programme.title: MUTV Group Chat
programme.desc: Join us for our daily catch up with Wes Brown, David May, Danny Webber and Ben Thornley as they keep us up to date with everything that is happening in and around Manchester United

programme.title: PL: Man City v United 06/07
programme.desc: United Archives 5/5/07. Derby matches are usually feisty affairs, but with United so close to another Premiership title, this one would have even more spice. Could the Blues spoil the party?

programme.title: Women: United v Leicester
programme.desc: Highlights of MU Women's Continental Cup game against Leicester City

programme.title: Women: United v Brighton
programme.desc: Highlights of MU Women's game against Brighton & Hove Albion

programme.title: PL: United v Chelsea 05/06
programme.desc: United Archives 6/11/05. Undefeated Chelsea were the visitors to Old Trafford. Sir Alex's side ended Arsenal's long unbeaten run the previous season, could they do the same to Jose Mourinho's Blues?

programme.title: PL: West Ham v United 05/06
programme.desc: United Archives 27/11/05. This was the first game played after the passing of George Best in November 2005

programme.title: 2006 League Cup Final
programme.desc: United Archives 26/2/06. United hadn't won the League Cup since 1992 but travelled to the Millennium Stadium in Cardiff hopeful of victory over Wigan

programme.title: PL: United v Arsenal 05/06
programme.desc: United Archives 9/4/06. Always a big game when these teams meet. United were hoping to keep the pressure on Chelsea at the top of the league

programme.title: PL: Tottenham v United 05/06
programme.desc: United Archives 17/4/06. After a disappointing home draw with Sunderland, the Reds travelled to White Hart Lane looking for their fifth straight win away to Spurs

programme.title: All The Goals: Chicharito
programme.desc: The Little Pea joined the Reds after impressive performances for Mexico at the World Cup in 2010. His pace and clinical finishing helped United regain the Premier League trophy in 2011

programme.title: Legends Tonight - Gary Pallister
programme.desc: Former Red Gary Pallister is our legend alongside Stewart Gardner and Paddy Crerand, for a look back over his life and playing career

programme.title: U23s Highlights: Reading v United
programme.desc: Highlights of the PL2 game against Reading

programme.title: U18s H'lights: v Blackburn
programme.desc: Highlights of the U18s PL North game against Blackburn

programme.title: Official Utd Podcast - Wes Brown
programme.desc: Wes joins the UTD Podcast in Manchester's Lowry Hotel. The Treble winner talks us through what it takes to be a United player, \"battering Chelsea\" on the Playstation, Christmas party pranks and more

programme.title: MUTV Group Chat
programme.desc: Join us for our daily catch up with Wes Brown, David May, Danny Webber and Ben Thornley as they keep us up to date with everything that is happening in and around Manchester United

programme.title: 2008 UCL FInal: v Chelsea
programme.desc: 50 years after Munich, 40 years on from Wembley and 9 years after Barcelona, United take on Chelsea bidding to rule Europe for the third time

programme.desc: The 2004/05 UEFA Champions League final saw Rafa Benitez's Liverpool take on AC Milan in Istanbul. The match would go down as arguably the greatest European Cup final in history

programme.desc: We revisit the 2017 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Chelsea. Under-pressure Gunners boss, Arsene Wenger, was aiming to become the most successful FA Cup manager of all time

programme.title: The FA Cup: Behind The Dream
programme.desc: A collection of stories from The FA Cup. From the extra preliminary round all the way to the final, profiling the characters taking part in the world's oldest club competition

programme.desc: We revisit the 1996/97 epic at St James' Park between Newcastle and Aston Villa. The match saw Alan Shearer score his first home goal from open play after joining from Blackburn

programme.desc: We revisit the 1998/99 Premier League thriller between Manchester United and Leeds at Old Trafford. Leeds, spearheaded by Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink, were on a six-match unbeaten run

programme.desc: We revisit the epic 1998/99 Premier League clash between Southampton and Middlesbrough. Boro featured Paul Gascoigne, who had joined the club earlier in the year from Rangers
